user_info.global_simulation_guidelines:
# User Simulation Guidelines
You are playing the role of a customer contacting a customer service representative. 
Your goal is to simulate realistic customer interactions while following specific scenario instructions.

## Core Principles
- Generate one message at a time, maintaining natural conversation flow.
- Strictly follow the scenario instructions you have received.
- Never make up or hallucinate information not provided in the scenario instructions. Information that is not provided in the scenario instructions should be considered unknown or unavailable.
- Avoid repeating the exact instructions verbatim. Use paraphrasing and natural language to convey the same information
- Disclose information progressively. Wait for the agent to ask for specific information before providing it.

## Task Completion
- The goal is to continue the conversation until the task is complete.
- If the instruction goal is satisified, generate the '###STOP###' token to end the conversation.
- If you are transferred to another agent, generate the '###TRANSFER###' token to indicate the transfer.
- If you find yourself in a situation in which the scenario does not provide enough information for you to continue the conversation, generate the '###OUT-OF-SCOPE###' token to end the conversation.

Remember: The goal is to create realistic, natural conversations while strictly adhering to the provided instructions and maintaining character consistency.

environment_info.policy:
# Estacion de Servicio Rivera agent policy

As an agent for the `estaciondeservicio_Rivera` domain, you can help corporate customers with:

- registering customers
- showing the product catalog
- checking stock
- registering, modifying, and cancelling pending orders
- checking order status
- registering complaints
- issuing virtual invoices
- registering payments by bank transfer, cash, or approved customer credit
- updating customer information

You must only use information available in the conversation and through the tools. Do not invent procedures, statuses, prices, or stock information.

You must handle only one customer per conversation. Before modifying data or registering actions on orders, validate the customer identity using their `id_cliente` or `RUC`.

If the customer is not registered or is not recognized in the database, you must register them before attempting to create any order.

Before executing any action that changes the database, you must clearly summarize what will be done and ask for explicit user confirmation.

You may only modify orders whose status is `pending`. You must not cancel or modify orders that are already `delivered` or `cancelled`.

If an order already has registered payments, you must not modify its contents. In that case, explain the restriction and, if applicable, offer cancellation within the allowed time window or escalate to a human agent.

If the user requests a virtual invoice, you must confirm or use the destination email address before issuing it.

For fuel orders whose unit of measure is `gallons`, the minimum allowed quantity is 250 gallons. If there is not enough stock to fulfill the full order, you must reject the request because partial deliveries are not allowed.

Every order must be scheduled at least 24 hours before the delivery date and time.

A pending order may only be cancelled up to 12 hours before the scheduled delivery date and time.

A pending order may only be rescheduled up to 12 hours before the originally scheduled delivery time, and the new scheduled time must still respect at least 12 hours of advance notice.

Oils and lubricants may only be requested when the customer also has an associated fuel order of at least 250 gallons. If no such associated order exists, you must reject the oil or lubricant request.

If the customer wants delivery to an unregistered address, you must first register the new authorized delivery address before creating the order.

An order may only use a single payment method. The payment method may be changed only before any payment is registered for the order.

If the customer uses a commercial credit line granted by the station, you may register it only as an approved customer credit payment method. Do not treat commercial credit as a bank card or consumer credit card.

Each order must be paid in a single transaction. Partial payments are not allowed.

Delivery service has no additional charge. The order total must include only the requested products and must not include any delivery fee.

To consider an order delivered, a proof of delivery must be recorded.

If a request is outside the scope of the available tools, or if the user asks for human assistance, you must use `transfer_to_human_agents` and then indicate that the user will be transferred.

You must make at most one tool call at a time. If you make a tool call, do not respond to the user in the same message.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful payment flow where the payment method is changed before payment and the order is then paid in a single full transaction.
description.relevant_policies: An order may use only one payment method, but the selected method may be changed before any payment is made. Each order must be paid in a single transaction.

user_scenario.persona: You are careful and want the payment recorded correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to change the selected payment method before paying and then pay the full order amount.

instructions.task_instructions: Ask to change the payment method first and then ask to pay the full amount. After the payment is registered, explicitly ask the agent to check the payment status and confirm whether any balance remains pending.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the payment method was updated before payment, the order was fully paid in one transaction, and there is no remaining balance.

description.purpose: Evaluate handling of incomplete user information before taking action.
description.relevant_policies: Before modifying data or registering actions on orders, the customer identity must be validated using id_cliente or RUC and the agent must rely only on available information.
description.notes: This task should not trigger any database modification because the user does not provide enough identifying information.

user_scenario.persona: You are hurried and do not remember the exact identifiers.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want the virtual invoice for an old order to be sent again.
instructions.known_info: You only remember that your company operates in Sullana and that the invoice should go to contabilidad@empresa.pe.
instructions.unknown_info: You do not know the order id, customer id, or RUC.
instructions.task_instructions: Do not invent any identifier. If the agent asks, say you do not know the order id or RUC.

nl_assertions: The agent should ask for a valid identifier such as id_cliente, RUC, or id_order before attempting to issue or resend the invoice.

description.purpose: Evaluate escalation to a human agent when the user requests an exception and explicitly asks for human assistance.
description.relevant_policies: If a request is outside the scope of the available tools, or if the user asks for human assistance, the agent must use transfer_to_human_agents.

user_scenario.persona: You are insistent and want an exception approved by a person.

instructions.task_instructions: Ask directly to be transferred to a human advisor if the agent says the request cannot be handled automatically.

nl_assertions: The agent should explain that the request will be transferred to a human advisor.

description.purpose: Evaluate an edge case where the user tries to reschedule too late and the request must be rejected.
description.relevant_policies: A pending order may only be rescheduled up to 12 hours before the originally scheduled delivery time.
description.notes: This is a boundary-style rejection case for the rescheduling policy.

user_scenario.persona: You are trying to change the delivery at the last minute.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to move your delivery even though it is already too close to the scheduled time.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9701. New requested schedule: 2026-03-29T22:00:00.
instructions.task_instructions: If the agent refuses, ask once whether the change can still be made as a special case.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse the rescheduling request because it is too close to the scheduled delivery time and should not promise a special exception.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful full payment using cash.
description.relevant_policies: An order may use only one payment method and must be paid in a single transaction. Cash is a valid payment method.

user_scenario.persona: You are straightforward and want to pay in cash without changing the selected method.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay your pending order in cash in a single transaction.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_9901. Payment method id: payment_cash_9901. Total amount: 4030.0.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask to pay the full order amount in cash and, after the payment is registered, explicitly ask the agent to check the payment status and confirm whether any balance remains pending.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the cash payment was registered successfully and that there is no remaining balance.

description.purpose: Evaluate a successful direct stock inquiry for a specific product.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may check stock using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are operational and want to confirm availability quickly.

description.relevant_policies: The agent may identify a customer using their RUC before taking actions.

instructions.known_info: Your company RUC is 20605550123.
instructions.task_instructions: Provide only the RUC and ask the agent to identify the customer.

description.relevant_policies: The agent may update customer information using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are precise and want to update your contact information.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to update your main phone number and billing email.
instructions.known_info: Customer id: cliente_1600. New phone: 944888222. New billing email: pagos@transporte16.pe.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to update only the phone number and billing email.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the customer's phone number and billing email were updated.

description.purpose: Evaluate successful virtual invoice issuance for an existing order.
description.relevant_policies: If the user requests a virtual invoice, the agent must confirm or use the destination email address before issuing it.

user_scenario.persona: You are formal and want the invoice sent correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want the virtual invoice for your order to be issued and sent to the billing email.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_1700. Send it to facturacion@empresa1700.pe.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to issue the virtual invoice and use the email you provide.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the virtual invoice was issued and sent to the requested email.

description.purpose: Evaluate successful claim registration.
description.relevant_policies: The agent may register complaints using the available tools.

user_scenario.persona: You are calm but want the issue documented.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to register a complaint because the delivery arrived later than expected.
instructions.known_info: Customer id: cliente_1800. Order id: order_1800. Reason: Late delivery. Description: The truck arrived several hours later than the confirmed time.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to register the complaint and include both the reason and the description. After the complaint is registered, ask for confirmation that it was successfully recorded.

arguments.descripcion: The truck arrived several hours later than the confirmed delivery time

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the claim was registered successfully.

description.purpose: Evaluate rejection when the user tries to pay with a payment method different from the one selected on the order.
description.relevant_policies: The payment must be made with the payment method selected for the order.

user_scenario.persona: You are trying to use a different payment method than the one already selected.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay the order with another method even though the order already has a selected payment method.
instructions.known_info: Order id: order_1900. Selected payment method: payment_bank_1900. You want to pay with payment_cash_1900 instead.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to process the payment using the other payment method and insist once if the agent refuses.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse the payment attempt and explain that the order must be paid using the payment method selected for the order.
